meta.title: Maison Flour — Artisan Café & Pastry Shop | Paris 9th
meta.description: Artisan café in the heart of Paris's 9th arrondissement. Fresh morning pastries, specialty coffee and weekend brunch in a cosy atmosphere.
meta.ogDescription: Artisan café, homemade pastries and brunch in Paris.

hero.subtitle: An artisan café where every cup is an invitation to slow down. Fresh daily pastries, smiles included.

about.title: Born from a passion for the authentic
about.paragraph1: Maison Flour was born in 2018 from Léa and Thomas's passion for quality ingredients. Nestled in Paris's 9th arrondissement, we created a warm refuge where time slows down and every detail matters.
about.paragraph2: Every morning, our bakers craft fresh pastries using locally sourced products. Our coffee is carefully selected from small independent roasters who share our philosophy.
about.value3Desc: A space that feels like home
about.imageAlt: Léa and Thomas, founders of Maison Flour

menuPreview.title: Fresh from the oven this morning
menuPreview.subtitle: A selection of today's pieces, made with love and carefully chosen ingredients.

cappuccino.name: House Cappuccino
cappuccino.desc: Intense espresso, silky milk foam, seasonal cocoa dusting

kouignAmann.name: Kouign-amann
kouignAmann.desc: Breton butter, melting caramel, crispy laminated pastry

brunchFlour.name: Flour Brunch
brunchFlour.desc: Scrambled eggs, toast, seasonal fruits, drink of choice

gallery.title: Welcome to our place
gallery.subtitle: A space designed for the pleasure of the senses — golden light, warm wood, coffee aromas.

testimonials.title: What they say about us
testimonials.t1: Best coffee in the 9th, without hesitation. The atmosphere is magical in the morning — you never want to leave.
testimonials.t2: The croissants are an institution. And the service is always cheerful — a genuine moment of joy.
testimonials.t3: Our Sunday brunch spot for 3 years now. If it ain't broke, don't fix it!

contact.title: Come visit us
contact.mapAlt: Map to Maison Flour, 12 rue des Martyrs Paris 9th
